LanguageData.FB_BileMortarResearch.label: bile mortar gland
LanguageData.FB_BileMortarResearch.description: Unlock the Bile Mortar Gland, a living artillery organ that grows bileburst podlings and launches mature ones as volatile incendiary shells.
LanguageData.FB_BileMortarResearch.generalRules.rules: subject_story->grew artillery organs from spitter tissue
